product_overview: SuaGrana is a comprehensive financial management platform designed to provide users with secure authentication, centralized financial data processing, and advanced analytics through intuitive dashboards. It offers full lifecycle management of financial operations including transactions, accounts, investments, budgets, and travel expenses with real-time validation, rich visualizations, and robust reporting capabilities.
core_goals: Ensure absolute data consistency and integrity by centralizing all financial calculations in a dedicated finance engine module.
Provide a secure and seamless user authentication system with route protection and session management.
Deliver comprehensive financial dashboards with interactive charts and metrics for insightful analysis.
Implement robust transaction and account management features with full validation, editing, and rollback capabilities.
Support investment portfolio tracking and management with insightful reports and operational modals.
Offer advanced budget planning tools with performance analytics and smart configurations.
Enable complete travel and expense management with itinerary integration and currency exchange handling.
Integrate an intelligent notification and reminder system to keep users informed.
Guarantee system security with monitoring dashboards and backup management.
Ensure accessibility and performance through reusable UI components and Progressive Web App features.
key_features: Authentication System with session providers and route guards to secure data access.
Financial Dashboard aggregating data, financial metrics, and various visualization widgets.
Transaction Management supporting creation, editing, deletion, and hierarchical views with validations.
Bank Account Management including transaction histories, editing capabilities, and modal dialogs.
Investment Portfolio features encompassing dashboards, investment operations, dividend handling, and sales reporting.
Travel Management with trip creation, expense tracking, itinerary views, expense reporting, and currency exchange tools.
Budget Planning Suite with budget insights, performance analysis, and smart budget configuration options.
Advanced Reports System consolidating diverse financial and investment reports.
Interactive Date Picker and Calendar UI components for user-friendly date selections.
Smart Notification System delivering alerts, reminders, and user-configurable notifications.
Rich Data Visualization components including cash flow projections and interactive charts.
Progressive Web App optimizations enable offline capabilities and advanced settings.
Security System comprising real-time monitoring dashboards and backup solutions.
Extensive library of reusable UI components for buttons, inputs, dialogs, tables, and more.
Shared Expenses feature allowing collaborative expense tracking and debt management.
user_flow_summary: Users authenticate securely via login screens protected by route guards and session providers.
After login, users access the Financial Dashboard displaying consolidated financial summaries, charts, and metrics.
Users manage financial transactions through creation forms, editing modals, and hierarchical transaction lists with validation.
Users handle bank accounts, viewing histories, editing account details, and conducting operations via modal dialogs.
Investment portfolio operations allow users to add investments, track dividends, sell holdings, and analyze reports.
Users plan budgets, view performance analyses, and configure smart budget plans for better financial control.
Travel features enable users to create trips, record expenses, view detailed itineraries, and manage currency exchange.
Advanced reports are accessible where users analyze comprehensive financial and investment data.
Notifications are received and managed through a smart notification center with reminder capabilities.
Security dashboards provide users with insights into system integrity and backup status.
validation_criteria: All financial calculations must originate exclusively from the centralized finance-engine module with no overrides in UI layers or hooks.
Consistent usage of financial metrics hooks across all dashboards and reports to ensure data uniformity.
Automated end-to-end tests cover critical transaction flows: creation, edition, deletion, and persistence validation with rollback verification.
ESLint and custom lint rules prevent usage of disallowed operations (reduce, map, filter) on transaction data outside the finance engine.
Transform validation scripts from archived locations to active codebase to ensure real-time detection of orphaned transactions.
CSS selectors in automated tests must be updated to use valid and stable selectors, preventing failures.
Date formatting throughout the system is standardized using a unified date utility module to guarantee consistency across UI components.
Security validation includes monitoring of protection mechanisms, audit logs, and backup system integrity.
Progressive Web App functionalities must meet offline usage and advanced setting requirements.
User interface components pass accessibility and performance benchmarks as part of continuous integration pipelines.
